title: Bridge Essay: Brain-inspired bodily self-perception model for robot rubber hand illusion.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.

**Brain-inspired bodily self-perception model for robot rubber hand illusion.**. Patterns (N Y).. PMID: 38106608. DOI: 10.1016/j.patter.2023.100888. The core of bodily self-consciousness involves perceiving ownership of one'sbody. Acentral question is how body illusions like the rubber hand illusion (RHI) occur. Existing theoretical models still lack satisfying computational explanations from connectionist perspectives, especially for how the brain encodes body perception and generates illusions from neuronal interactions.
